category_sources: source_facts.description says "Modern Day Portscanner"; official GitHub README describes RustScan as a modern port scanner and lists security/networking topics.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is rustscan; official repository README and title use RustScan.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README contains installation and usage sections; README links the project wiki as documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/bee-san/RustScan, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a port scanner; official GitHub topics include rust, security, networking, nmap, pentesting, scanning, and security-tools.
